title: Audio file upload fails with 422 error
symptom: When attempting to upload an audio file to the AssemblyAI API, a 422 error occurs with the message 'Upload failed, please try again'. This happens consistently regardless of file size.
root_cause: The AssemblyAI API requires a specific Content-Type for binary uploads. Using the wrong Content-Type or sending the file as a form parameter instead of raw binary data can lead to a 422 error.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request Node settings in n8n.
Set the Method to POST and the URL to api.assemblyai.com.
Add the Authorization header with your API key.
Set the Content-Type header to application/octet-stream.
Select 'Binary' for Request Content and ensure Binary Data is set to {{$binary.audio.data}}.
Increase the timeout to 120 seconds to accommodate larger file uploads.
agent_instruction: Adjust the HTTP Request Node settings to use application/octet-stream and send the binary data directly.
